vocab.meaning: rất khéo léo hoặc giỏi làm việc gì đó
vocab.example: I've been a dab hand at sketching since I was seven, and I still spend my weekends with a sketchbook.

vocab.meaning: từ rất lâu rồi; từ thuở sơ khai
vocab.example: I've been obsessed with building model planes from the year dot; it's practically part of my DNA now.

vocab.word: get a real kick out of
vocab.meaning: cảm thấy rất thích thú/hào hứng với cái gì
vocab.example: Even as a child, I got a real kick out of gardening, and that passion hasn't faded one bit.

vocab.meaning: đã tồn tại hoặc quen thuộc từ rất lâu
vocab.example: My interest in stamp collecting goes back a long way, starting when my grandfather gave me his old album.

vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: Whenever I played the piano as a kid, I had a whale of a time, so I decided to keep it up as an adult.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu học hỏi hoặc tích lũy kinh nghiệm từ cái gì
vocab.example: I actually cut my teeth on basic coding when I was ten, and it’s remained my primary hobby ever since.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm trong thế giới riêng (do quá say mê)
vocab.example: I used to get lost in my own world while reading fantasy novels as a kid, and I’m still a huge bookworm today.

vocab.meaning: học được điều gì đó từ khi còn rất nhỏ
vocab.example: I learned the art of baking at my mother's knee, and I still find it the most relaxing way to spend an afternoon.

vocab.word: take to something like a duck to water
vocab.ipa: /teɪk tu ˈsʌmθɪŋ laɪk ə dʌk tu ˈwɔːtə/
vocab.meaning: bắt đầu làm gì đó rất tự nhiên và giỏi ngay lập tức
vocab.example: I took to swimming like a duck to water when I was five, and it’s been my go-to sport for over two decades.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn qua thời gian; không thay đổi
vocab.example: My fascination with stargazing has stood the test of time, remaining my favorite pastime since primary school.
